name: Headnote Extraction (Westlaw Key Numbers Replacement)
description: Automated headnote and holding extraction from a court opinion. Separates ratio decidendi from obiter, identifies distinguishing factors, applies NOSLEGAL tags, and builds a searchable proposition index. Replaces Westlaw Key Numbers, LexisNexis headnotes, and manual law clerk annotation.
promptTemplate:
Extract structured headnotes from the following court opinion. Jurisdiction: {{jurisdiction}}. For each headnote: the legal proposition in one sentence, the verbatim source passage, whether it is ratio or obiter, any distinguishing facts, and the NOSLEGAL area of law.

{{description}}

substitutions.description: Paste or reference the full court opinion text here.
